name: remifocus
description: 三阶段考研英语单词学习调度系统 — Obsidian 插件

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && npx esbuild main.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:obsidian --format=cjs --outfile=main.js && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('ui/styles.css','styles.css');console.log('Build OK')"
scripts.sync: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const t='D:\\obdisian仓库\\橘子笔记\\.obsidian\\plugins\\RemiFocus';if(!fs.existsSync(t))fs.mkdirSync(t,{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('main.js',path.join(t,'main.js'));fs.copyFileSync('manifest.json',path.join(t,'manifest.json'));fs.copyFileSync('styles.css',path.join(t,'styles.css'));const s=path.join(t,'system');if(!fs.existsSync(s))fs.mkdirSync(s);console.log('=== SYNCED to '+t+' ===');"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run sync
scripts.clean: if exist main.js del main.js & if exist styles.css del styles.css
